_comment: WATCH-ONLY list of the JOINT (long-term) account's holdings. This is DELIBERATELY separate from holdings.json. The agent cannot trade the joint account, so these names get (1) COVERAGE — added to the report's scan universe so they're analyzed every run — and (2) BUY/ACCUMULATE signals only, surfaced in the report's 'Joint long-term port' section. They NEVER drive the Agentic exit alerts (SELL/TRAIL/THESIS-CHECK) or the ntfy ACTION trigger — only holdings.json does that. Maintain this list to mirror the joint book (reconcile with get_equity_positions on the joint account). EPIX^ is intentionally omitted (rights/temp symbol FMP won't resolve).
